nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
nodes.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括小拟䳍、孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黄腿穴䳍
nodes.summary: 黄腿穴䳍（Yellow-legged tinamou，学名 Crypturellus noctivagus），分类上属于Tinamiformes，并归入䳍科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。
nodes.shortSummary: 黄腿穴䳍（台湾作黃足穴䳍）（学名：Crypturellus noctivagus）是䳍科穴䳍屬的一种鸟类。 特征 黄腿穴䳍体重约561.99克，翼长约182.2毫米，嘴峰长约32.9毫米，喙宽度约6.1毫米，喙厚度约5.3毫米，跗蹠长约53.9毫米，尾长约61.8毫米。黄腿穴䳍…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: zabele (Spix, 1825) | range_map = Crypturellus noctivagus map.svg }} The yellow-legged tinamou (Crypturellus noctivagus) is a species of tinamou found in wooded and shrubby habitats in tropical and subtropical eastern Brazil. This superficially quail-like bird has a grey-brown plumage and two easily separated subspecies

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: noctivagus, the nominate race, occurs in southeastern Brazil: Minas Gerais (Doce River area), southern Bahia, Espírito Santo, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo, Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul. * C

links.label: 保护等级
links.evidence: status = NT

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The yellow-legged tinamou suffers from widespread and continuing habitat destruction and hunting pressure. Overall, although its numbers are decreasing they are not critical and therefore listed as Near Threatened by the IUCN. It has an occurrence range of . There are no recent records from parts of its range, and it appears to have been extirpated from Rio de Janeiro.Gagliardi, R

There are no recent records from parts of its range, and it appears to have been extirpated from Rio de Janeiro.Gagliardi, R
